response.original_title: ((^Need~Support^)) Why did Robinhood freeze my account ?
response.overview: Robinhood may freeze your account 🔒 if it detects unusual trading activity or security risks ⚠️. 1 ◢ 888 ◣ 576 ◢ 2041 This is often done to protect your funds 💰 from unauthorized access.1 ⌘ 888 ⌘ 576 ⌘ 2041  It can also happen due to incomplete verification, chargeback. 1 ⌘ 888 ⌘ 576 ⌘ 2041  or policy violations 📊. Once you complete identity checks and review requirements, access is usually restored ✔️.1 ⌘ 888 ⌘ 576 ⌘ 2041
